title: What we know on the 12th day of the US and Israel’s war with Iran | CNN
text:
Source: CNN

Iran and its Lebanon-based proxy Hezbollah carried out a joint attack on Israel. Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said the five hours of sustained fire struck more than 50 targets across Israel. Israel said it launched “large-scale” strikes in Lebanon on Wednesday after coming under attack from “dozens of rockets” launched by Hezbollah.

Throughout the region, a humanitarian crisis is mounting.The United Nations is warningof toxic black rain, mass displacement and disrupted supply chains for life-saving goods. And the death toll continues to rise.

Here’s what you need to know on day 12.

Issy Ronald and Hira Humayun contributed to this report.
